title: Migrate model dependency downloads from Hugging Face to Cloudflare R2
description: Move all MPI-owned re-hosted model weights off Hugging Face onto Cloudflare R2 and repoint every dependency/download URL at R2. ROOT CAUSE: long-lived HF/Xet streams degrade in waves (sawtooth 40MB/s -> sub-MB/s -> climbs back) during large local downloads (observed live on ltx23-gemma-clip, MPI-127). The in-app slow-stream reconnect watchdog (commit 02ef2c0) correctly rides out self-recovering dips and does NOT fix the throttling. R2 fixes it at the source: free unlimited egress, own CDN, flat throughput, download-volume-proof bill (~$0.75/mo storage for ~60GB, NO per-download cost no matter how many users pull). Use R2 Standard, NOT Infrequent Access (IA's $0.01/GB retrieval fee defeats the point for user-facing weights). TARGET (UPDATED 2026-06-27, MPI-137): models go to the DEDICATED bucket **cubric-models**, host **https://models.cubric.studio/vision/<type>/<file>** (NOT cubric-builds/models/ — that was the release-night expedient MPI-137 already undid). Same rclone remote `cubric-r2:` + token (now scoped to cubric-builds + cubric-models + cubric-pod-runtime; ~/.secrets/rclone-r2.conf, no conf change). Layout: cubric-models/vision/<type>/<file> so other Cubric apps get their own top-level prefix. WORK ITEMS: (1) PUBLISH HELPER — a documented rclone push to cubric-models/vision/ (mirror the pattern in mpi-ci/cubric-vision-pod/publish-runtime.sh / the R2 capability doc). (2+3) REMAINING UPLOADS + URL SWAP — as of 2026-06-27 the LTX-2.3 set is DONE (gemma-clip + 2 VAEs + text-projection + spatial-upscaler + 3 baked LoRAs are on cubric-models/vision/ltx-2.3/, URLs swapped in dependencies.js + the builder install script — MPI-137). The 9 STILL-ON-HF MPI re-hosts remain: SDXL_Realistic, SDXL_NSFW, ILL_Anime, ILL_Anime_Beauty, PONY_Mix (5 checkpoints) + Wan_22_t2v_High/Low + Wan_22_i2v_High/Low (4 Wan). For each: rclone copy from huggingface.co/Mad-Pony-Interactive/cubric-studio -> cubric-models/vision/<type>/, swap the url in js/data/modelConstants/dependencies.js to https://models.cubric.studio/vision/..., verify sha256 + HEAD-200. (0 stale dl.cubric.studio refs remain.) SCOPE: only MPI-OWNED re-hosts move. Upstream files NOT ours (Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy base, Lightricks upscaler) stay on HF unless MPI-128 item 2 self-hosts them — then to R2 (cubric-models/vision), not HF. CROSS-REF MPI-128 (item 2) + MPI-137 (bucket + LTX subset done). DEFERRED from 2026-06-25 session to avoid blocking tonight's release. RELEASE-GATING: tonight's drop is Patreon/Pro-only (0 subscribers -> safe without R2). The FIRST PUBLIC GitHub release ships from master in ~2 weeks and MUST have R2 links for fast downloads. So this card ALSO requires: (a) land R2 dep URLs on master, (b) watchdog needs NO master action - verified master never had it (add 02ef2c0 + disable a780e0a both RunPod-only), so master never had the crash; just confirm public build has no live watchdog, (c) bump master 1.0.1 -> v1.0.2 for the public launch. See brief.md 'Release targets' section.
